title: delego approval notification & decision callback
description: Draft (0.4): the outbound notification that delivers a parked approval to a human surface, and the inbound signed decision callback that resolves it. See spec.md §7.3. Additive — no hashed or signed wire bytes change.

notification.description: Outbound event emitted when an action is parked for approval. MUST NOT carry a credential or any secret.

approval_id.description: Identifier of the parked approval this notification is about.

instruction.description: The human-readable instruction the action was proposed under (plaintext of intent_hash).

action_summary.description: Human-readable summary of the authorized action (e.g. 'POST api.example.com/orders').

nonce.description: Single-use value the matching decision callback MUST echo (replay defence).

exp.description: Epoch seconds after which a decision callback for this notification is a no-op (the approval has expired → deny).

routing_group.description: Who SHOULD decide (spec.md §7.2). Advisory; set by the Authorizer/policy, never the Agent.

required_approvers.description: How many distinct approvals are required before status becomes approved (spec.md §7.2).

decision.description: Inbound callback that resolves a parked approval. Authenticated by an approval key the Agent does not possess (spec.md §7.3). Carries NO action — the §7 fingerprint/intent guards still bind the action at release time.

nonce.description: MUST match the notification's nonce; single-use.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the human decision.

signature.description: Authentication over (approval_id, decision, nonce, ts) by the approval principal (human-approval trust domain, §2). An unverifiable signature MUST leave the approval pending.

kid.description: OPTIONAL approval-key id, so a verifier can select the key and support rotation.

decision_note.description: OPTIONAL human note recorded for audit (spec.md §7.2). MUST NOT alter the binding.
